headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -125.4)
key_insights: Fears trending up 81% over 7 days (strong momentum)
Alert: Overall sentiment has significantly decreased (z=-2.82)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 153 quotes and an overwhelming 112 at strong intensity - people are expressing serious anger and dissatisfaction today.

• At 72.7, frustration levels are well above average but still within the typical range seen over the past few months.

• Fears spiked dramatically from yesterday's low of -19.4 to 30.6, while optimism crashed from positive territory to -22.1.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
